context: Tests whether the agent implements streaming CSV parsing with zod schema validation, correct field types and constraints, row-level error reporting, and a dry-run preview mode for a catalog import pipeline.

checklist.name: Streaming parser
checklist.description: Uses createReadStream piped to csv-parse (or equivalent streaming API) with async iteration rather than loading the whole file into memory (no fs.readFileSync or fs.readFile on the uploaded CSV)

checklist.name: csv-parse options: columns
checklist.description: Passes columns: true to csv-parse so the first row is treated as headers

checklist.name: csv-parse options: skip_empty_lines and trim
checklist.description: Passes both skip_empty_lines: true and trim: true to csv-parse

checklist.name: Zod schema used
checklist.description: Uses the zod library (import from 'zod') to define the product row schema rather than manual validation

checklist.name: Handle regex constraint
checklist.description: The handle field is validated with a regex that enforces lowercase alphanumeric and hyphens only (e.g., /^[a-z0-9-]+/)

checklist.name: Published field as enum+transform
checklist.description: The published field accepts 'true', 'false', '1', '0' and is transformed to a boolean

checklist.name: Row numbering starts at 2
checklist.description: Row error reporting starts at index 2 (not 0 or 1), since row 1 is the header

checklist.name: Structured error output
checklist.description: Validation errors include both the field name and a message (not just a generic error string)

checklist.name: Generator/async iterable parser
checklist.description: The CSV parser is implemented as an async generator (async function*) that yields results row by row

checklist.name: Dry-run mode exists
checklist.description: A dry-run or preview function is implemented that validates without writing to any database or store

checklist.name: Dry-run return shape
checklist.description: Dry-run returns validRows count, errorRows count, and an errors array (with at most 100 errors)

checklist.name: inventory_quantity default
checklist.description: The inventory_quantity field defaults to 0 when not present in the CSV row

checklist.name: Price coercion
checklist.description: The price field is coerced to a number (not kept as string) and validated as positive
